title: The post that keeps selling after the first scroll
caption: Built for dense proof, fast saves, and simple repurposing.

wallOfText.headline: Your best sales page is probably hiding in your support inbox.
wallOfText.body:
Start with the objection customers repeat most.
Show the before-state in plain language.
Then show the product moment that makes the problem disappear.
That becomes a save-worthy short instead of another generic ad.
